questions.label: Parking lot is free of trash and debris
Exterior lights and store signage are functioning properly
Landscaping is clean, orderly, and well maintained
Building exterior is clean and in good condition
Required signage is posted and clearly visible (DCC, weapons, hours of operation)
Entry doors are clean and in proper working condition
Trash and waste areas are secured and locked
Reception floors and carpets are clean
Reception counter is clean, organized, and free of clutter
Computers and electronics at reception are clean and in good working condition
Walls and surrounding reception areas are clean and clutter-free
Interior doors in the reception area are clean and in good condition
Walls and baseboards are clean and well maintained throughout reception areas
Interior glass and windows in reception areas are clean
Music is playing at an appropriate volume and uses an authorized playlist
Sales floor and register area lighting is on and functioning properly
TVs and digital displays are on and working properly
Only current and compliant media is displayed on screens
Sales floor and register area floors and carpets are clean
Register countertops are clean, clear, and well organized
Computers and electronics at registers are clean and in good working condition
Product displays are properly set up and maintained
Promotions are current and follow company guidelines
Security presence is clearly visible and professional
Security staff greets guests appropriately and professionally
Security interactions with guests are calm, respectful, and non-confrontational
Overall security presence contributes to a safe and welcoming environment
BOH / Kitchen area is clean, organized, and free of clutter
Refrigerator(s) are clean and properly maintained
All BOH / Kitchen equipment is clean and in good working condition
Current and up-to-date policies are posted in BOH / Kitchen common areas
Bathroom floors are clean and free of debris
Sinks and toilets are clean and sanitary
Soap, paper towels, and other dispensers are stocked and functional
No excess or unsecured supplies are visible
Bathroom cabinets and storage areas are clean and well organized
Storage and receiving area floors are clean and free of debris
No trash, empty boxes, or unused materials are present
Storage and receiving areas are organized and orderly
Containers, shelving, and bins are used appropriately to keep items organized
Vault / fulfillment area floors are clean and free of debris
Vault / fulfillment area is organized and orderly
Return bin is used properly and managed according to procedure
Work surfaces and tabletops are clean, clear, and organized
Computers and electronics are clean and in good working condition
Dress code is consistently followed by staff
Staff tone is professional and appropriate with guests
Staff actively engages with guests in a helpful and welcoming manner
Side conversations at the counter are minimal and do not distract from guest service
Staffing levels are appropriate (not overstaffed or understaffed)
Team members are not using personal phones while guests are present

bonusSection.title: Positive Experiences Observed
bonusSection.description: Optional bonus points for observed excellence. Notes required.
